tooltip.oxyarena.ametra_sword.tradeoff: More damage and sweep hits, but less speed
tooltip.oxyarena.murasama.ability: Passive: every 3rd hit is a critical
tooltip.oxyarena.rivers_of_blood.passive: Passive: hits build up bleed on the target
tooltip.oxyarena.rivers_of_blood.detail: When the meter fills, it bursts for flat and max-health damage
tooltip.oxyarena.black_blade.passive: Passive: on hit, deals 3 damage in pulses after 2 ticks
tooltip.oxyarena.black_blade.ability: Hold right-click for 1s: fires a black blade
tooltip.oxyarena.black_blade.detail: The projectile deals 5 damage in 1-damage pulses every 2 ticks
tooltip.oxyarena.forbidden_relic: Event item: hold it to earn escalating public rewards
tooltip.oxyarena.earthbreaker.ability: Hold right-click: charges a crack through the ground
tooltip.oxyarena.earthbreaker.detail: On release: opens a temporary fissure that deals damage and enables falls
tooltip.oxyarena.kusabimaru.ability: Right-click: opens a perfect deflect window
tooltip.oxyarena.soul_reaper.ability: Right-click: swaps form and creates a fire star
tooltip.oxyarena.spectral_blade.passive: Passive: each hit embeds a spectral mark
tooltip.oxyarena.spectral_blade.ability: Right-click: bursts marks from your last target within 8 blocks
tooltip.oxyarena.spectral_blade.detail: Each mark lasts 20s and deals 1 extra damage when consumed
tooltip.oxyarena.assassin_dagger.ability: Right-click: replays 50% of your last 2s of damage on your last target
tooltip.oxyarena.assassin_dagger.detail: The replay keeps the original spacing between hits
tooltip.oxyarena.elemental_gauntlet.pass: Hold right-click: fires elemental projectiles in bursts
tooltip.oxyarena.elemental_gauntlet.deta: Weak homing and a small splash behind the target
tooltip.oxyarena.flaming_scythe.passive: Active skill: Fire damage heals you for 10s
tooltip.oxyarena.flaming_scythe.ability: Right-click: ignites you and adds fire on hit for 10s
tooltip.oxyarena.cobalt_sword.passive: Passive: Ignores 25% of armor on hit
tooltip.oxyarena.incandescent_tool.passi: Passive: fire on hit and self-burn while held
tooltip.oxyarena.zero_reverse.detail: Restores saved health, hunger, effects, fire and position
tooltip.oxyarena.necromancer_staff.captu: Kill a common hostile or elite mob: stores its soul
tooltip.oxyarena.necromancer_staff.summo: Right-click: summon | Shift + click: recall summon
tooltip.oxyarena.frozen_needle.passive: Passive: hits build up frostbite on the target
tooltip.oxyarena.frozen_needle.detail: On full meter: deals damage, freezes for 15s and increases damage taken by 20%
tooltip.oxyarena.ghost_saber.detail: Deals 5 damage and leaves an echo that repeats the path after 30 ticks
tooltip.oxyarena.ghost_saber.reset: Kills by the dash or echo reset the cooldown
tooltip.oxyarena.chocolate_sword.food: When eaten: restores hunger and saturation
tooltip.oxyarena.occult_armor.passive: Full set: camouflage while standing still
tooltip.oxyarena.netherite_armor.passive: Full set: knockback and explosion resistance
event.oxyarena.miniboss.spawned: A MINIBOSS HAS APPEARED! Bob spawned at X: %s, Y: %s, Z: %s!
event.oxyarena.miniboss.reward_hint: Run to find him! Whoever lands the final blow will receive a Black Diamond Sword and an enchanted book with Sharpness IV and Knockback II!
event.oxyarena.miniboss.killed: Player %s defeated Bob and claimed the Black Diamond Sword and enchanted book!
event.oxyarena.miniboss.died_to_world: Bob died to the environment and nobody claimed the reward...
event.oxyarena.inundacao.started: The clouds darken... water from the depths begins to rise!
event.oxyarena.inundacao.warning: Seek high ground! The water will rise up to layer %s.
event.oxyarena.inundacao.water_level: The water has reached layer Y: %s!
event.oxyarena.inundacao.drown_fail: The waters were stronger! You are out of this flood's reward.
event.oxyarena.inundacao.reward_success: You survived the great flood! Receive the Magic Bow!
event.oxyarena.inundacao.reward_fail: You were swallowed by the waters and received no event reward.
event.oxyarena.inundacao.drain_started: The water begins to dry up slowly...
event.oxyarena.inundacao.finished: The sun shines again and the water has fully receded. The event has ended!
event.oxyarena.inundacao.emergency_start: Emergency draining activated! Pulling all flood water out of the map...
event.oxyarena.inundacao.restore_started: Starting the magical restoration of rivers and oceans...
event.oxyarena.inundacao.restore_finishe: Natural restoration complete! Rivers and oceans are back to normal.
event.oxyarena.mercador.name: Jorginho
event.oxyarena.mercador.started: [Event] Merchant Jorginho has just arrived at X: %s, Y: %s, Z: %s!
event.oxyarena.mercador.warning: He will leave in 5 minutes! Trade quickly!
event.oxyarena.mercador.finished: [Event] Time is up! Merchant Jorginho has left...
event.oxyarena.nevoa.started: [Ruin Alert] The fog has begun closing the event area!
event.oxyarena.nevoa.center: The safe zone is shrinking toward X: %s, Z: %s. Stay alert!
event.oxyarena.nevoa.final_stand: The final safe zone has formed. Hold your ground!
event.oxyarena.nevoa.finished: [Event] The ruin fog has dissipated. The area is clear again.
event.oxyarena.nevoa.reward_success: You endured the fog and received %s Estus Flask(s)!
event.oxyarena.nevoa.reward_fail: You fell too many times during the fog and received no Estus Flasks.
event.oxyarena.nevoa.status.closing: closing, X %s to %s, Z %s to %s, time left: %s
event.oxyarena.mineracao.started: MINING FEVER HAS STARTED! All ores inside the map event area will drop double for 5 minutes.
event.oxyarena.mineracao.finished: Mining Fever has ended! Ores in the event area are back to normal.
event.oxyarena.caca.continues: Target %s died, but the hunt continues.
event.oxyarena.caca.hunter_win: VICTORY! %s killed target %s and received the Combat Kit!
event.oxyarena.caca.survivor_win: SURVIVOR! %s endured the hunt and became a Super Human!
event.oxyarena.caca.survivor_reward: You received 2 Netherite Ingots and permanent buffs!
event.oxyarena.caca.target_offline: Hunt target %s logged out and the reward was lost.
event.oxyarena.roulette.cooldown_started: Next event in %s. An airdrop may happen during the interval!
event.oxyarena.airdrop.started: An OXY supply drop was sighted falling at X: %s, Z: %s!
event.oxyarena.airdrop.look_up: Look to the sky. First player there takes it all!
event.oxyarena.airdrop.landed: The OXY supply drop touched down at X: %s, Y: %s, Z: %s!
event.oxyarena.extracao_suprimentos.star: SUPPLY EXTRACTION! A locked public crate appeared at X: %s, Y: %s, Z: %s!
event.oxyarena.extracao_suprimentos.hint: Right-click the crate and stay within 3 blocks alone for 35 seconds to unlock it.
event.oxyarena.extracao_suprimentos.posi: Supply extraction crate at X: %s, Y: %s, Z: %s.
event.oxyarena.extracao_suprimentos.extr: %s started extracting the supply crate at X: %s, Y: %s, Z: %s!
event.oxyarena.extracao_suprimentos.brea: This crate is locked by the event.
event.oxyarena.extracao_suprimentos.open: The supply crate opened at X: %s, Y: %s, Z: %s!
event.oxyarena.extracao_suprimentos.stat: %s, %s%% extracted, crate at X: %s, Y: %s, Z: %s
event.oxyarena.reliquia_proibida.started: FORBIDDEN RELIC! A relic appeared at X: %s, Y: %s, Z: %s!
event.oxyarena.reliquia_proibida.hint: Hold the relic to earn escalating rewards. Dropping it or dying resets your hold timer.
event.oxyarena.reliquia_proibida.positio: Forbidden Relic carrier %s is at X: %s, Z: %s.
event.oxyarena.reliquia_proibida.carrier: %s dropped the Forbidden Relic. Their reward timer reset.
%s died with the Forbidden Relic. Their reward timer reset.
%s left with the Forbidden Relic. The relic returned to the arena.
%s left the arena with the Forbidden Relic. The relic returned to the arena.
%s lost the Forbidden Relic. Their reward timer reset.
event.oxyarena.reliquia_proibida.reward: %s held the Forbidden Relic for %ss and received: %s.
event.oxyarena.reliquia_proibida.reward_: %s held the Forbidden Relic for %ss and claimed a legendary reward: %s!
event.oxyarena.reliquia_proibida.finishe: %s mastered the Forbidden Relic. The event has ended!
The Forbidden Relic vanished. No player mastered its power.
event.oxyarena.apocalipse.infected: You were infected! No golden apples for you in this event.
event.oxyarena.apocalipse.reward_success: You survived the apocalypse! +%s Golden Apples
event.oxyarena.apocalipse.reward_fail: You died to the event zombies and received no reward.
death.attack.earthbreaker_crack: %1$s was swallowed by a crack in the earth
commands.oxyarena.event.start.already_ac: There is already an active event: %s
commands.oxyarena.event.roulette.start.f: Could not start the event roulette.
commands.oxyarena.event.roulette.start.a: The event roulette is already active.
commands.oxyarena.event.roulette.stop.in: The event roulette is not active.
commands.oxyarena.event.area.current: Current map event area: X %s to %s, Z %s to %s
commands.oxyarena.event.area.set.success: Updated map event area: X %s to %s, Z %s to %s
commands.oxyarena.event.area.reset.succe: Reset map event area to default: X %s to %s, Z %s to %s
commands.oxyarena.event.stop.miniboss.no: There are no active Bob instances in the world.
commands.oxyarena.event.inundacao.emerge: Could not start flood emergency draining.
commands.oxyarena.event.inundacao.restor: Could not start flood river restoration.
event.oxyarena.clones.started: YOUR CLONES ARE LOOSE! Defeat them before they escape with your items.
event.oxyarena.clones.recovered: Your clone was defeated and dropped %s.
event.oxyarena.clones.reward_basic: You defeated your clone and received a Grappling Gun!
event.oxyarena.clones.reward_perfect: You defeated your clone before it could steal! Receive a Grappling Gun and 5 Storm Charges!
event.oxyarena.clones.lost: The event ended and your clone escaped with %s.
event.oxyarena.tnt.started: The ground is erupting with TNT! Watch for the blasts.
event.oxyarena.tnt.reward_success: You survived the TNT eruption! Receive permanent Resistance I and a Cobalt Shield!
event.oxyarena.tnt.reward_fail: You died to the event TNTs and lost the reward.
event.oxyarena.caravana_pillager.started: PILLAGER CARAVAN SPOTTED! Raider groups are roaming the event area.
tooltip.oxyarena.zenith.detail: Each sword hits once per target | 1 to 8 block orbits
message.oxyarena.ametra_xray.enabled: Ametra X-Ray enabled: %s ore(s) within a %s block radius
message.oxyarena.ametra_xray.none: Ametra X-Ray: no ore found in the current radius
config.oxyarena.falling_tree.branch_leaf: Leaf radius used to validate branches
config.oxyarena.falling_tree.branch_max_: Maximum branch reach from the canopy
